checks.name: html_parser_executeGAS_GAS_URL
checks.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

checks.name: js_syntax
checks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('app.html','utf8'); const m=html.match(/<script>([\s\S]*)<\/script>/); new Function(m[1]); console.log('JS_SYNTAX_PASSED')"
